name: writhing_stalker.live_wounded_predator_mcw
description: Live wounded-predator row: badly injured stalker withdraws from a vulnerable/evidenced scene and avoids withdraw->strike jitter.

steps.label: post_load_wounded_predator_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: wounded vulnerable-midnight stalker fixture loads to live map

steps.label: audit_saved_midnight_before_wounded_predator
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not prove expected time before live writhing-stalker window
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved turn proves local midnight before wounded predator window

steps.label: audit_saved_writhing_stalker_before_wounded_predator
steps.abort_reason: saved active_monsters metadata did not contain required live-scenario footing
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved active_monsters proves one badly injured stalker starts at close plausible distance

steps.label: toggle_safe_mode_off_before_wounded_predator
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode is toggled off so the bounded live turn window is not consumed by warnings

steps.label: advance_wounded_predator_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: bounded live turn window runs with badly injured stalker and vulnerable player

steps.label: audit_writhing_stalker_wounded_predator_live_plan
steps.abort_reason: same-run artifact lacked injured withdraw/cooling lines
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact proves injured retreat overrides greed

steps.label: audit_writhing_stalker_wounded_predator_no_strike_snapback
steps.abort_reason: wounded stalker snapped back into strike during injured-retreat window
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact does not contain forbidden magic-target or strike lines

evidence_contract.claim: injured stalker self-preservation overrides greed with no immediate withdraw-to-strike snapback
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for writhing-stalker live fun behavior
evidence_contract.writeback_note: No save/writeback gate: these scenarios prove bounded live-plan behavior from current-run logs plus saved start-state footing; persistent map mutation is not part of the product claim.
